title: Assess landscape sites
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assess landscape sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect and collate initial information

pcs.text: Consult with client to confirm objectives of assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to confirm objectives of assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to confirm objectives of assessment.

pcs.text: Source and verify site plans and maps
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and verify site plans and maps?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and verify site plans and maps.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and collect resources for site assessment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare base plan of site and relevant surrounds.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify location, ownership and site boundaries.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record protected flora and fauna, current land use and environmental threats and problems.

pcs.text: Identify and record covenants, legislative and regulatory requirements that could affect the project, design or report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record covenants, legislative and regulatory requirements that could affect the project, design or report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record covenants, legislative and regulatory requirements that could affect the project, design or report.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine climate and weather conditions from historical data.
